Notice Of Motion To Quash Or Modify Deft'S Subpoenas Of Pltf'S Medical Records And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Alex M. Cleghorn, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Chig-Wei Wu
Michael J. Eng, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Wells Fargo Instituional Securities, LLC

After hearing, Plaintiff Chig-Wei Wu's Motion to quash or modify subpoenas of plaintiff's medical records; and request for sanctions.
Ruling as follows:
1- Motion to quash denied.
2- Subpoenas may issue as modified by the parties. Documents to be produced to plaintiff's counsel for preliminary review.
3- Request for sanctions denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Ntc And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Disco And Request For Issue Evidentiary And Monetary Sanctions Against Deft Wfis
Off Calendar Apr-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Bethany Caracuzzo, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Chig-Wei Wu
Susan T. Kumagai, Esq., and Michael J. Eng, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Wells Fargo Institutional Securities and Wells Fargo and Company

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified.
1. Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to discovery granted in part, denied in part, as follows:
a. Motion granted as to request for production no. 41; provided that production of documents is limited to documents in furtherance of application for a sales position during the period January 1, 2003 through May 31, 2005. Defendant may redact private information such as social security numbers or California license numbers.
b. Motion granted as to form interrogatory [employment] nos. 206.1; 211.1; and 215.1 [subject to attorney work product or attorney-client privilege]; as to the specified interrogatories, defendant shall serve a verified, code compliant, supplemental response within five days of the date of service of this order;
c. Motion denied as to form interrogatory [employment] no. 201.7;
d. Motion granted as to special interrogatory no. 1 and request for production no. 8; provided that production is limited to the period January 1, 2003 through May 31, 2005;
e. Motion granted as to request for production no.12; defendant may comply by producing a copy of the declaration sheet for any and all pertinent insurance policies;
f. Motion denied as to special interrogatory no. 7; and request for production no.9 and 10;
2. Request for sanctions denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
